positive: A stylized, mystical woodland scene featuring bioluminescent flora and fauna. Central focus is a serene, majestic deer with glowing antlers, positioned among vibrant, oversized stylized mushrooms and ferns. The color palette should be deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) contrasted with glowing neon accents of cyan and lime green. The art style is a sophisticated blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern graphic illustration, utilizing clean lines, dramatic silhouettes, and high contrast for clear apparel printing. The composition must be balanced, allowing the central subject to dominate a circular or square crop area. Highly detailed, ethereal glow, crisp vector-like edges, magical realism.
